'''takate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:featherily|featherily]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-k-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:featherily|featherily]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| takate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || takate
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || takatesher
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || takatesherëm
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || takatero
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || takateshë
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || takateshëm
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || gokitakatero
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || gokitakateshë
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || gokitakateshëm
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || gotakankerom
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gotakankeshë
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gotakankeshëm
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || gotakankeya
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || takaterom
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || takatemu
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || takateya
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || gokitakaterom
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || gokitakatemu
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || gokitakateya
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || takakate
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || takakatesher
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || takakatesherëm
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || takakatero
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || takakateshë
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || takakateshëm
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || gokitakakatero
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || gokitakakateshë
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || gokitakakateshëm
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || gotakakankerom
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gotakakankeshë
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gotakakankeshëm
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || gotakakankeya
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || takakaterom
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || takakatemu
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || takakateya
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || gokitakakaterom
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || gokitakakatemu
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || gokitakakateya
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || tækæte
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || tækætesher
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || tækætesherëm
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || tækætero
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || tækæteshë
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || tækæteshëm
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || gokitækætero
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || gokitækæteshë
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || gokitækæteshëm
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || gotækænkerom
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gotækænkeshë
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gotækænkeshëm
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || gotækænkeya
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || tækæterom
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || tækætemu
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || tækæteya
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || gokitækæterom
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || gokitækætemu
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || gokitækæteya
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || tafkafte
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || tafkaftesher
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || tafkaftesherëm
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || tafkaftero
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || tafkafteshë
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || tafkafteshëm
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || gokitafkaftero
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || gokitafkafteshë
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || gokitafkafteshëm
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || gotafkafnkerom
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gotafkafnkeshë
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gotafkafnkeshëm
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || gotafkafnkeya
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || tafkafterom
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || tafkaftemu
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || tafkafteya
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || gokitafkafterom
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || gokitafkaftemu
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || gokitafkafteya
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
